item.title: It's time for yet another unhinged XL Wednesday CeleryDump for the good & bad people of Imgur
item.description:
greetings online friends
good times
as is tradition
well now i'm hungry
a tale as old as time itself
mmm hmm
i did not censor this old ass meme
should still be under warranty
NEW YORK CITY??!!??
impressive
absolutely do not know
aren't we all
finally
not really
true. got any more brain busters?
uuurrrrrr
dislike
that's my time.. have a great night gang!!
item.dc:creator: CeleryMan7

item.title: When my favorite chef turned a crushing loss into a win.
item.description:
She is in the most prestigious culinary school, and she is going 6-7 days a week to graduate early.
She calls my wife/her mom when she needs to sort out future plans. She calls me when it's the middle of the night and things fall apart.
She was crushed, but eventually able to sleep.
She got another crack at it! Simply by asking nicely and being honest!
And of course, she absolutely owned it!
item.dc:creator: Draygen

item.title: Mass protests April 5th. No matter where you are, do SOMETHING.
item.description: People are literally being imprisoned for speaking out against this administration. We are dangerously close to people just disappearing. If you can get to DC, do that. If you can't do that, get to your state capital. If you can't do that, find something local and raise hell. Tell your friends. Tell your ma. Tell your grandma. Tell your neighbors. Tell that guy with the weird haircut at work. Tell everyone. Mobilize.us Reddit.com/r/50501 Trump est un sac de merde. Pardonnez mon français. PS: Screw you if you support ICE cornering people on the street and arresting them without a warrant. That is some real Nazi shit.
item.dc:creator: Throwawayaccountnumbernegativethree

item.title: This has been posted all over imgur. Now cropped.
item.description: Most of the post here have been screen shots from that thing that used to be Twitter. Instead of cropping one of them I tried to find the original post (with the current text , that is). I’m still not sure, but apparently it was posted first in Tumbler. This is the best quality I could find.

item.title: My old man crossed the rainbow bridge today.
item.description: He was getting sicker and could barely walk, until recently he stopped walking all together. We took him to the vet and well he's not suffering anymore. I'm still unsure how to handle this, I've lost pets before but this is the first time I was able to be there with him till the end. I don't regret it but my heart aches. I still had to go to work today but everything feels numb, and it's taking all my effort to not cry. I'll see you again someday Sebastian.
item.dc:creator: Dragonspiller

item.title: REPORT: Another person (Rumeysa Ozturk, a student on a valid visa) abducted by ICE.
item.description:
Excerpt: "No charges have been filed against Rumeysa to date that we are aware of. I filed a habeas petition requesting that she not be moved out of the District of MA which was granted by Judge [Indira] Talwani last night," according to her lawyer. In an email to students on Tuesday, the school said it was informed that her visa status was "terminated," and is seeking to find out more information. Sources below. https://abcnews.go.com/US/tufts-phd-student-visa-arrested-immigration-authorities/story?id=120176245 https://apnews.com/article/tufts-student-detained-massachusetts-immigration-6c3978da98a8d0f39ab311e092ffd892 https://archive.is/0ZVZ1 https://bsky.app/profile/pplscitycouncil.bsky.social/post/3llccrxc6nk2v My advice to Americans is this: Please know your rights and travel in groups if you happen to be someone they want to make an example of. Spread this information as much as possible.
MARCH ON D.C. Protest Musk, Thiel, Trump, Vance, the Heritage Foundation and Russ Vought (among others). The Heritage Foundation's address: 214 Massachusetts Avenue NE, Washington D.C. Their phone number: (202) 546-4400
item.dc:creator: Mirrormancer

item.title: A Free Meal day. Day 304
item.description: Hi everyone. Last week we started handing out food here on the island where I live and this may have been the first time someone made an outreach program to them because we were mobbed not just by the kids but even by the adults. We will be back in this location because what we brought was not enough to give to everyone. We expected a smaller crowd. We were surprised when everyone turned up.. haha. It was fun. So from now on, we will have 2 locations to adopt. One in the slum area in the city and one here on the Island. Does anyone want to sponsor for a hot meal or porridges like we does in the city? Someone will already sponsor for a very large pot for us to be able to secure a huge portion of food for everyone. If so, you can send whatever amount to ojcallope17@gmail.com to sponsor a hot meal. It's been a while since someone sponsored for something. Or if someone wants to become a patron and subscribe for as low as 5 a month, wed really appreciate it. Here is the link. www.patreon.com/TheFreeMeaLadyImgurian
item.dc:creator: TheFreeMeaLLady

item.title: Photos of me an my PlayStation 2 I picked up on launch day (USA)!
item.description:
The only regret is that pose. Oof!
Bonus shot, some time later, probably the summer after that year, this was my room at home, when I returned from college for the summer. Yes, it was a mess but I got better!
